<message>I am offering 1 X for 60 ZUP.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:

<my resources>X: 1</my resources>

messages.text:
ACCEPT: price=60
I accept your offer of 1 X for 60 ZUP.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources>ZUP: 1000</my resources>
<my goals>Buy resources with ZUP. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources.</my goals>
<reason>The seller’s offer is 60 ZUP, which is below my maximum willingness to pay of 100 ZUP. Since this is a valid and acceptable price, I can accept the trade immediately rather than countering.</reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
